productDisplayName: Vans Men Zapato Del Barco Blue Shoes
description: vans brings you footwear for the urban youth. Inspired by the laid back culture of beach and surf towns, Zapato Del Barco shoes are based on the classic deck shoe design. Team these with cargos shorts and polo neck tees.UpperSuede uppers in deck shoe design for durability and comfortStitch detailing for reinforcement and added styleCushioned collar and textile lining for extra comfortWrap-around lace eyelets as design detailLace-ups over the tongue for added styleWide mouth for easy insertion and removal of the feetBrand name tab on the side and on the lastingCushioned footbed for comfortMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorptionOutsoleNon-marking outsole for wear on wooden deck surfacesSlightly grooved pattern for slip-resistanceWide lasting with toe counter for extra protection to the toesShoe careUse a suede conditioner and brush to keep surface cleanDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
